[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up cartoon-style face shows a bald orange-haired character with glasses in an outdoor-looking background.

The main subject is a stylized head and upper face of a cartoon figure, shown from the front at a slight angle, with a bald scalp, light tan skin, a broad nose, a mustache, and a smiling mouth. The character wears rimmed glasses with a thin frame and has thick, dark eyebrows. Orange hair or an orange head covering appears at the top and around the sides of the head.

The setting appears to be outdoors, suggested by a green landscape and a pale blue sky, with blocky shapes in the background resembling hills or trees. The lighting is bright and even, with no visible shadows.

No important visible text detected.

The image shows a cartoon character’s face close-up with glasses and a friendly expression. The background is simplified and colorful, suggesting an outdoor scene.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
